title: calpicarpum roxburghii
intro: Calpicarpum roxburghii, also known as the Roxburgh's calpicarpum, is a type of plant native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. It is a shrub with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Calpicarpum roxburghii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
